# Ip Geolocate

## Overview

gSage AI — IP Geolocation tool.

## Tool

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `ip_geolocate` | Look up geographic location (country, city, lat/lon) and ASN for one or more IPs using offline GeoLite2-ASN + IP2Location databases | `network:geolocate` | — | — |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

_No configuration-derived environment variables._

**Other environment variables** (read directly from the source — not part of `config_schema`):

| Variable | Default in code |
| --- | --- |
| `GEOIP_ASN_DB_PATH` | `"/app/dbs/geoip/GeoLite2-ASN.mmdb"` |
| `IP2LOCATION_DB_PATH` | `"/app/dbs/ip2location/IP2LOCATION-LITE-DB11.IPV6.BIN"` |
